scope_integration_2026_06_14.role: agent tool workflow layer only; infrastructure implementation belongs to local-ai-infrastructure
scope_integration_2026_06_14.future_conditional_project: GPU ML Systems & Model Training only if user opens distributed training/pretraining as main goal

acceleration_policy.applied_on_2026_06_22: User explicitly pulled prompt/loop learning earlier; recorded as D01, not D000.

latest_learning_summary.core_conclusion: Prompt Engineering should not transfer long-template cost to the user. Loop Engineering treats agents as fallible and relies on low-cost detection, stop, correction, and evidence loops.
latest_learning_summary.user_feedback: User strongly rejected manual long prompts and low-quality teaching that shifts control burden to the user. Future teaching must be proactive, low-token, concrete, and self-running.

next_action: Continue D02 on 2026-06-23 unless the user asks to continue earlier. D02 should focus on Context Contract and context-budget control, starting with active recall from D01 failures and the low-cost loop model.
